provenance.capture_method: SYNTHESIZED for Story 4.5 (not a live capture): an energy-only fixture (the FlowModel consumes only the five *_power sensors + optional grid_status). RAW tesla_fleet/powerwall signs (battery -=charging, grid +=import, others >=0); the dialect normalizes to canonical before the model. Every power sensor stamped at reference_now so the freshness reader reads it fresh (measured) when now=reference_now.
provenance.notes: State 6 of 7: STORM-WATCH / ISLANDING. Grid tap dead — grid_power is 'unavailable' (numById -> undefined -> present:false, NO edge); grid_status:'off_grid' is included for honesty but is NOT a flow input (the model is power-only). The Powerwall islands (raw battery +2.0 discharging -> canonical -2 -> edge +2 -> forward, injects) and home draws (reverse, 2.0), so the bus reroutes Powerwall->Home. solar/wall_connector absent. Conserves: +2 (powerwall) -2 (home) = 0.
